title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
